mapper.insert: insert into service_item (category_id, name, price, description, duration_minutes, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{categoryId},#{name},#{price},#{description},#{durationMinutes},#{status},#{createTime},#{updateTime})
mapper.select:
select si.*,sc.name as categoryName from service_item si left join service_category sc on si.category_id=sc.id
si.category_id=#{categoryId}

select si.*, sc.name as categoryName from service_item si left join service_category sc on si.category_id=sc.id
si.status=1 and si.id=#{id}
